title: ONLINE STORE
description: I will create a full-featured turnkey online store: stylish landing page, product catalog, cart, wishlist, and smooth navigation. I will integrate payment, basic SEO, and make it responsive for all devices. You will get a ready-to-use tool for stable sales and business growth.

title: LANDING PAGE
description: I will develop a modern landing page with unique design and a focus on conversion. Thought-out structure, strong messaging, and fast loading for maximum efficiency. Perfect for presenting a product, service, or running ad campaigns.

title: BUSINESS CARD WEBSITE
description: I will create a concise and stylish website to present your company, specialist, or service. Clear structure, key information, and convenient user experience. Great for building trust and first contact with clients.

title: TG BOT + MINI APP
description: I will develop a Telegram Mini App and bot for your tasks: from simple services to complex applications inside Telegram. Integrations, logic, UX, and stable performance on all devices. You get a convenient tool for audience interaction and process automation.

title: PARSERS
description: I will develop custom parsers for collecting data from websites, marketplaces, and aggregators. I will set up automation, filtering, and export to Excel, JSON, or databases. Perfect for analytics, price monitoring, and business scaling.

title: ML/AI SCRIPTS
description: I will create and implement ML/AI solutions for your tasks: chatbots, recommendations, data analysis, and automation. I will select models, train them, and integrate them into your product or business processes. This will speed up work, reduce costs, and increase efficiency.
